element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Automatic targeting with power depletion/recharge mechanic teaches resource management from start
Four distinct pet types (Dragon Frye, Boomerang Lizard, Thunder Raven, Ball O' Fire) each with unique attacks; players learn to swap companions strategically
Hidden locations encourage exploration; types include healing, max life increase, attack improvement, invulnerability
Consistent throughout all 8 levels as core mechanical challenge
Escalates through mid-game; trap damage affects life bars
Each level culminates in boss fight; required to progress
Revive power-ups restore defeated pets; creates resource scarcity decision-making
High-risk/reward: requires full charge time, hits all on-screen enemies

typical_tension_triggers: Depleted Alisia power requiring recharge vulnerability
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Linear escalation with boss gates; tension builds through middle levels as enemy density and trap complexity increase; final level (8) likely peak difficulty before climactic final boss

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden power-up locations scattered throughout Levels 1-7 encourage thorough exploration; no save system means discovery rewards immediate benefit
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Power-ups placed in hidden locations suggest off-path exploration and environmental scanning

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to lightning attack and pet mechanics; basic platforming and enemy encounters; teaches power management without overwhelming complexity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy variety and trap density; more complex platforming sequences; players expected to master pet-swapping and power recharge timing
difficulty_curve.late_game: Levels 5-8 escalate enemy aggression and trap complexity; final level (8) culminates in climactic battle against awakened Baldour
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (Level 1 end) - tests basic combat and dodge mechanics
Mid-game boss gauntlet (Levels 3-5) - requires pet strategy optimization
Final level (Level 8) - peak difficulty with climactic narrative payoff

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 8 levels follows side-scrolling platformer convention: navigate horizontally through enemies and obstacles, reach boss arena at level end, defeat boss to unlock next level
Levels 1-7 contain power-ups in hidden locations requiring active exploration and environmental scanning; incentivizes thorough play and rewards curious players
Level design likely includes encounters where specific pet types provide tactical advantage (e.g., Thunder Raven's screen-wide attack for dense enemy clusters, Dragon Frye for single-target damage)
Enemy and obstacle placement creates moments where Alisia must choose between attacking and defending; spacing between attack bursts forces strategic pause timing
